category_sources: Official X.Org man page describes xinit as the X Window System initializer.
source_facts.description says xinit starts the X Window System server.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org man page name is xinit.
docs_sources: Official X.Org xinit and startx manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop GitLab xorg/app/xinit repository URL.
tags_sources: Official X.Org man page documents xinit starting an X server and first client/session script.
